name: claude-code-design-and-implement-review-loop
title: claude-code-design-and-implement-review-loop
description: Shared Claude Code workflow for issue resolution or planning-only design and implementation-plan handoff. The workflow owns both the sequential path and the bounded feature-local fanout path, then joins accepted plans before implementation or planning-only completion.
